title: Well-Known Labels, Annotations and Taints — service.beta.kubernetes.io/aws-load-balancer-nlb-target-type (beta)
text:
Example:
service.beta.kubernetes.io/aws-load-balancer-nlb-target-type: "true"
Used on: Service
The
AWS load balancer controller
uses this annotation.
See
annotations
in the AWS load balancer controller documentation.

Example:
service.beta.kubernetes.io/aws-load-balancer-private-ipv4-addresses: "198.51.100.0,198.51.100.64"
Used on: Service
The
AWS load balancer controller
uses this annotation.
See
annotations
in the AWS load balancer controller documentation.
